gist.headline: Director's chair
gist.blurb: Storymake just landed in the ecosystem! Now you can spin up studio-quality TikToks, Reels, and Shorts from a simple text prompt.
gist.summary: Added Storymake to the community app showcase, enabling users to generate short-form videos from text prompts.
gist.impact: Creators can now easily discover and use Storymake to automate their TikTok, Reel, and YouTube Short production directly from text.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about 'Storymake', an AI video creation platform for short-form content. Visual symbols: a director's clapperboard, film reels, a smartphone showing a video, the pollinations bee acting as a movie director.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret, holding a pixelated clapperboard next to a glowing smartphone screen showing a short video. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
